From the Margins to the Market

Melon 29:7 is an economic mobility platform. We educate with intent — every skill we teach leads somewhere: a certificate earned, a business launched, a website built, a workforce entered. We go where opportunity is missing and build what belongs there.

Sign Up for Services Fund the Work →

Answer a few questions and we'll match you with the right service — free or paid. Takes about 60 seconds.

Growing

For Sponsors & Partners

Join the Mission

Melon 29:7 partners with organizations and individuals who believe economic inclusion is not charity — it's strategy. Your support directly funds education and digital inclusion programming for entrepreneurs who've been locked out of mainstream economic opportunity. We don't just train — we deploy. Walk alongside us.

Partner With Us
For Entrepreneurs

Locked Out of the Mainstream? This is Built For You.

If you're building a business in a financial system that wasn't designed for you — Melon 29:7 is where you start. We address what's actually in the way before we hand you a business plan template. Free services. Real support. Open door.

Sign Up for Free Services
About Melon 29:7

Accompaniment, Not Charity

Melon 29:7 SE Michigan was founded by Odell Palacio — immigrant from Panama, raised by a single mother, and someone for whom financial exclusion has never been abstract. It has been a household reality. The work of Melon 29:7 is not charity delivered from a place of arrival. It is accompaniment offered from a place of shared journey.

Odell brings nearly three decades across banking, real estate, and community economic development — including foreclosure and redemption period transactions and nearly four years of direct community economic development work in Southeast Michigan, where he provided one-on-one business coaching, facilitated financial readiness workshops, and developed the Substitutionary Economics framework through practice with reentry and immigrant entrepreneurs.

Melon 29:7 is not a new experiment. It is the formalization of a model already tested in practice — built specifically to serve people most excluded from mainstream entrepreneurship support.

3 decades
Across banking, real estate, and community economic development — from branch management to micro-lending decisions
Proven Track Record
Built corporate and community partnerships with major SE Michigan institutions during a decade of direct economic development work — from energy companies to trusted social service organizations.
Jeremiah 29:7
The founding conviction: individual entrepreneurial success and community economic health are not separate goals. Seek the prosperity of the city.
What We Do

Show Up for the Person. Then Build the Business.

We operate on a simple conviction — that education must have a destination. Every skill we teach leads somewhere: a certificate earned, a business launched, a website built, a workforce entered.

01
📚

Education

Whether you want to start a business or earn a certification, we build a path around your goal — not a one-size curriculum. Financial literacy, small business coaching, workforce certification prep, and pre-loan readiness. You choose the destination. We help you get there.

02
💻

Digital Inclusion

Closing the digital divide by building real skills and real digital assets — not just awareness. Website development and ownership, digital readiness training, AI and technology fundamentals, and online business presence building.

Partners & Funders

Organizations on the same team

"Every entrepreneur needs a team. We show up as yours. From the first conversation to the first customer."

Our Differentiator

Every Entrepreneur Needs a Team.

We start with a simple question: tell me your story. From there, we tailor your path — specifically to the business you want to build, the certification you want to earn, or the barrier that is standing in the way. No templates handed to strangers. No one-size curriculum. Just a plan that actually fits.

Get Started
🧩

Financial Readiness Assessments

Every participant begins with a baseline assessment to identify what is blocking forward motion — before any business curriculum is delivered.

🤝

One-on-One Coaching

Direct, individualized technical assistance — adapted to each entrepreneur's specific situation, stage, and goals. We meet people where they are.

💻

Digital Inclusion

Website development, digital readiness training, and AI fundamentals — building real skills and real digital assets, not just awareness. Free to participants.

🚪

The Open Door

Entrepreneurship is not linear. Melon 29:7 welcomes alumni back when new challenges arise. Graduated clients may continue with services through a modest fee structure — sustaining the program while deepening the relationship.

💼

Employment as a Pillar

Maslow was right. Before self-actualization comes safety — and income security is safety. A job is not the dream. But stable income — managed with intention — is a wealth building tool and a mental health tool. For clients who need that foundation while they build, we maintain a free weekly job board covering Southeast Michigan.

Browse Open Jobs →
What We Stand On

Five Values. One Direction.

🫂

Accompaniment Over Charity

The Founder is part of the work, not apart from it. We walk alongside — not above.

💚

Trauma-Informed Practice

Financial behavior cannot be changed without first understanding the experiences that shaped it.

⚡

Show Up First

We start by asking for your story. From there we build a path specific to you — the business you want to start, the certification you want to earn. No templates. No assumptions.

🌱

Sustainability Over Dependency

Melon 29:7 is designed to sustain itself through earned revenue and contracts, not grants alone.

📍

Place-Based Commitment

We are rooted in Southeast Michigan. Our success is measured by what this community becomes.

Get Involved

Two Ways to Walk Alongside

Every contribution goes directly to program delivery for entrepreneurs who've been locked out of mainstream support. Choose the path that fits you.

🌱
For Foundations & Individuals

Donate to Melon

Your gift directly funds education and digital inclusion programming — for the entrepreneurs most systems overlook. Every skill we teach leads somewhere. Tax-deductible. All amounts welcome.

🤝
For Corporations & Businesses

Become a Corporate Partner

Corporate partnerships fund program infrastructure, cohort delivery, and long-term capacity. Partners receive visibility, community trust, and the satisfaction of directly expanding economic inclusion in Southeast Michigan. Inquiries via check or formal agreement — let's talk.

🌱

I Want to Give

Let us know you're interested in giving and our team will follow up with secure payment details. No credit card information is collected here.

Giving Amount (approximate)

Melon 29:7 will reach out within 24 hours with secure payment options.

🙏

Message Received.

Our team will be in touch within 24 hours with secure payment details and a note about how your gift will be used. You're part of this now.

🤝

Corporate Partnership Inquiry

Tell us about your organization and what you're looking for. We'll follow up to explore the right partnership structure.

This will open your email client addressed to the Melon 29:7 team directly.

✅

Inquiry Received.

Thank you for your interest. The Melon 29:7 team will be in touch within a few business days to explore the right partnership structure together.
